metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews (with per-diff early-exit on docs-only PRs), agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines with stale-base preflight gate, consistency discipline (FB-0010). v1.2.4 adds workflow-spawn skip prevention: /flow:staff-review gains an explicit 'next step is /flow:ship' footer, /flow:ship Step 1.0 surface adds the 'never bypass with gh pr create' rule, workflow.md Step 10 names the FB-0010 workflow-step sub-class.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, /flow:doctor verification skill, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (16 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.4 adds workflow-spawn skip prevention (FB-0010 workflow-step sub-class): /flow:staff-review gains an 'After this skill' footer naming /flow:ship as the canonical next step, /flow:ship Step 1.0 assumption surface gains visual emphasis + a 'never bypass with gh pr create' reminder, and workflow.md Step 10 adds the explicit discipline statement. Defense for the 9th FB-0010 incident, surfaced when an author bypassed /flow:ship and ran gh pr create directly during PR H1.
